creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168551
Patch to the ports tree

Simple update to bring devel/visualparadigm to versoin 13.0 build 20160304.

Attached poudriere logs for {9.3,10.2}amd64

Tested on 10.2 amd64 and checked that it works fine (only linux-oracle-jdk, the only Java VM supported).

The upstream project didn't provide information/log about the changes in this build.
